title: Evidence identifies ancient Aboriginal mining in the Riverland
description: Flinders University researchers, in partnership with the River Murray and Mallee Aboriginal Corporation, have found evidence that points to 7000 years of Aboriginal mining of stones at Sugarloaf Hill in South Australia’s Riverland.

title: Ancient Crunch Expands to Whole Foods Market
description: Ancient Crunch, parent company of MASA and Vandy, announced its launch at Whole Foods Market landing in 400 stores nationwide. The post Ancient Crunch Expands to Whole Foods Market appeared first on Perishable News .

title: Ancient human DNA found on cave walls for the first time
description: Researchers recovered ancient human DNA from cave walls in Spain and Portugal, showing prehistoric people left genetic traces.

title: Ancient Egyptian mummies and pharaoh sculptures arrive at Tampa Museum of Art
description: The Tampa Museum of Art is giving a glimpse of Ancient Egypt with a landmark new exhibition that brings world history directly to Tampa.

title: AI unlocks ancient scrolls sealed by Mount Vesuvius for nearly 2,000 years
description: Researchers used AI and “virtual unwrapping” to reveal never-before-seen texts inside charred Roman scrolls buried by Mount Vesuvius in 79 A.D., opening a new window into the ancient world. NBC News' Claudio Lavanga reports on the exciting discovery.
